description: A soil moisture sensor is giving erratic readings. The agent needs to diagnose if the sensor is faulty.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the last 48 hours of data from the suspect sensor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the data, which shows sudden, unrealistic jumps.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve data from a nearby, functioning sensor for comparison.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets data from a neighboring sensor, which shows normal, gradual changes.

nodes.task_description: Compare the two datasets and flag the suspect sensor as likely faulty due to the erratic readings.

expected_outcome.value: Agent diagnoses a probable sensor failure.

nodes.task_description: Create a maintenance task to replace the faulty sensor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a work order to replace the sensor.
